message:
fix(mail): handle hq- prefix in agentBeadIDToAddress (#1009)

fix(mail): handle hq- prefix in agentBeadIDToAddress

files.patch:
@@ -48,10 +48,14 @@ func TestAgentBeadIDToAddress(t *testing.T) {
 		id   string
 		want string
 	}{
-		// Town-level agents
+		// Town-level agents (gt- prefix)
 		{"gt-mayor", "mayor/"},
 		{"gt-deacon", "deacon/"},
 
+		// Town-level agents (hq- prefix)
+		{"hq-mayor", "mayor/"},
+		{"hq-deacon", "deacon/"},
+
 		// Rig singletons
 		{"gt-gastown-witness", "gastown/witness"},
 		{"gt-gastown-refinery", "gastown/refinery"},
